design_philosophy.vibe: Clean, reassuring, and technically precise. Avoids the 'messy handyman' trope. Think 'Medical Doctor for your House'.

rules: Use Inter for all body text, buttons, and inputs.

primary.description: Deep Professional Blue - Used for Headings, Footer, and Primary Actions (hover).

secondary.description: Modern Plumbing Blue - Used for Icons, Service Highlights, and Trust Badges.

accent.description: Emergency Orange - Used ONLY for 'Call Now' buttons and Urgent CTAs.

success.description: WhatsApp Green - Used specifically for WhatsApp floating button and success states.

layout.grid_system: Use 'Bento Grid' for Services and Gallery. Mobile-first: 1 column -> md: 2 columns -> lg: 3/4 columns.
strategies: Mobile First: Sticky 'Call Now' bar at the bottom for mobile users (z-50).
Split Hero: Text on Left (or Bottom on mobile), Image on Right (or Top).
Wave Dividers: Use SVG waves between sections to soften the 'blocky' feel.

buttons.primary: bg-accent hover:bg-accent/90 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary/10 hover:border-primary hover:bg-primary/5 font-semibold py-3 px-8 rounded-full transition-all
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center gap-2 font-bold fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 animate-bounce-slow

cards.service: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md border border-slate-100 transition-all duration-300 group hover:border-secondary/20
cards.testimonial: bg-slate-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-100 relative

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-secondary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-secondary/20 rounded-lg py-3 px-4 transition-all

visual_enhancers.borders: Subtle 1px borders in slate-100/slate-200 to define structure without heaviness.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 for sticky headers.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width: 1.5px. Color: Secondary Blue (#1E88E5).

motion.entrance: framer-motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }}
motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is recommended for premium feel.

hero_bg.treatment: Overlay with dark gradient (hero_overlay) to ensure text readability.

emergency_vehicle.usage: Why Choose Us / Fast Response Section

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on blue buttons has sufficient contrast. Use darkened orange for hover states.
accessibility.labels: All icon-only buttons (like WhatsApp) must have aria-label.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus ring (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-primary) for keyboard navigation.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' for Headings.
Avoid full-width buttons on desktop; keep them auto-width but generous padding.
Do not use pure black (#000000); use Slate-900 (#0F172A) instead.
Ensure all images have lazy loading enabled.
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup the layout wrapper with Poppins/Inter fonts configuration.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Build the Sticky Mobile CTA first (it's the most critical conversion element).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Develop the Hero section with the 'Split' strategy and provided background image.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Create the Testimonials section using the Google Review card style.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Integrate the Contact form with Shadcn components and Google Maps placeholder.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_7: Final polish: Add smooth scroll (Lenis) and entrance animations.
